evals.prompt: I ran `npx shadcn@latest init --preset b6tOz2WRv --base base --template react-router` and new components import `{ IconCheck }` from `@tabler/icons-react`. Normalize this to our icon workflow.
evals.expected_output: Detects @tabler/icons-react generated imports from preset, migrates usage to sprite Icon where practical, adds missing glyphs with Sly, runs npm run build, keeps minimal exception policy.
expectations: Mentions npm run build for sprite/types

evals.prompt: I just ran `npx shadcn@latest add breadcrumb` and the new file imports ChevronRight and MoreHorizontal from lucide-react. Make this match our icon setup.
evals.expected_output: Explains lucide from shadcn default; adds Tabler (or fallback) SVGs via Sly; replaces with Icon from #app/components/ui/icon.tsx; runs npm run build; notes kebab-case names and a11y.
expectations: Mentions searching or replacing lucide-react in shadcn output
Mentions npm run build for sprite/types

evals.prompt: Add a `calendar` icon for the schedule button using our normal pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Tabler-first via Sly, Icon usage, build step.

evals.prompt: Should we standardize on Tabler, Hugeicons, or keep Radix for new icons?
evals.expected_output: Tabler primary, Hugeicons fallback, avoid mixing many families.
expectations: Warns against mixing too many icon families

evals.prompt: Optimize this Prisma query for the notes list loader.
evals.expected_output: No icon pipeline; database/loader focus only.
expectations: Does not require Sly or sprite Icon steps
